title: Oliver's Kitchen ® Premium Garlic Press - Super Easy to Use & Clean Garlic Crusher & Mincer - Crush Garlic & Ginger Effortlessly (No Need to Peel) - Built for Life - Strong & Durable (Silver)
features: 💪 CRUSH WITH EASE: Our garlic mincer's large chamber allows you to crush more than one clove at a time, effortlessly. You can even leave the whole skin on without having to get your hands sticky and stinky with our garlic presser. Crush everything - even your enemies (if your enemies are garlic cloves)

🌀 SPEND MORE TIME COOKING, LESS TIME CLEANING: Unlike the garlic crush you last threw away, Oliver's Kitchen's garlic crusher leaves less waste and is easy to clean. 100% dishwasher safe, keeping your kitchen super tidy. You’d have to buy Lynx garlic if you want to smell of garlic.

⏳ NEVER THROW AWAY A GARLIC PRESS AGAIN: Backed up with a Lifetime Guarantee, our garlic mincer is superior to other inferior garlic crushers. Super strong and durable. Built to withstand a mammoth-sized crushing

💎 LOOKS BEAUTIFUL IN YOUR KITCHEN: Slick, stainless steel style design. Feels great in the hand and looks amazing; even it's elegant, cardboard packaging makes it a perfect gift for anyone (except maybe vampires)

👪 WE ARE A REAL, BRITISH FAMILY: With cooking at the heart of our home: Our kitchenware reflects this: Oliver's Kitchen adds the spice of fun to your family cooking (and some might say, with British cooking you need all the spice possible!)
